text: Why doesn't Aunt Jennifer tell anyone how old she is?
zh: 为什么珍妮弗阿姨从不告诉别人自己的年龄?

text: My aunt Jennifer is an actress.
zh: 我的珍妮弗阿姨是一名演员。

text: She must be at least thirty-five years old.
zh: 她至少已经三十五岁了。

text: In spite of this, she often appears on the stage as a young girl.
zh: 尽管如此,她在舞台上常常扮演年轻女孩。

text: Jennifer will have to take part in a new play soon.
zh: 珍妮弗很快就要参演一部新戏。

text: This time, she will be a girl of seventeen.
zh: 这一次,她要扮演一个十七岁的女孩。

text: In the play, she must appear in a bright red dress and long black stockings.
zh: 在戏里,她必须穿一条鲜红色的裙子,配黑色长筒袜。

text: she had to wear short socks and a bright, orange-coloured dress.
zh: 她不得不穿短袜和一条鲜艳的橙色裙子。

text: If anyone ever asks her how old she is,
zh: 如果有人问起她的年龄,

text: she always answers, 'Darling, it must be terrible to be grown up!'
zh: 她总是回答:'亲爱的,长大成人一定很可怕吧!'
